quotes.text: The app is crashing today sir . Despite logging through mobile verification, it is automatically getting logged out even after catching otp
everything is fine can you make different app for upi if possible like full payment app upi, card , fd , and rewards and credit card facilities
Excellent application. unfortunately I closed my trading account. Now I want to reopen my trading account. But there are no option to reopen

action_ideas: Prioritize fixing app crashes and persistent login/logout issues, especially post-OTP verification.
Develop a clear in-app option and process for users to easily reopen closed trading accounts.
Improve overall platform stability and performance, particularly for critical trading functionalities.
